title: OmniFormatter Python Configuration Schema
description: Formatting configuration for Python. Defaults match Black 24.x.

lineLength.description: Maximum line length. Black default is 88 (not PEP 8's 79).

indentationSpaces.description: Spaces per indentation level (PEP 8 mandates 4). NEVER use tabs.

useTabs.description: PEP 8 prohibits tabs. Must remain false.

skipStringNormalization.description: If true, preserve original quote style. If false, normalize to double quotes (Black style).

skipMagicTrailingComma.description: If true, ignore trailing commas that force multi-line output.

targetVersion.description: Target Python version(s). Affects formatting decisions.

typeAnnotations.description: Preserve and properly format PEP 484 type annotations.
